description: Add MCP_KEYCLOCK_READ_ONLY env var to filter non-GET Keycloak operations out of generated MCP tools

parallelizationNotes.wave1-wave4: Strictly sequential - each builds directly on the prior file change (config -> report shape -> filtering logic -> wiring)
parallelizationNotes.wave5: T5 (unit test) and T6 (README doc) both depend only on T4 and touch disjoint files - safe to run in parallel
